snippet.title: Moira Dela Torre - Paubaya | Official Music Video | feat. Joshua Garcia & Julia Barretto
snippet.description:
At dito nagtatapos ang kabanata ng Patawad. 
Sana naramdaman mo yung "kalma. Yung lubag ng loob." 

Sana lahat tayo ay lumabas na handang sumugal at magmahal muli. 
At maalala natin palagi na ang pag-asa ay hindi isang pantasya na binubulag tayo sa katotohanan. Dahil lahat ng bagay ay may dahilan. 
Hindi ka nag-iisa.
Kaya ang tanging panalangin na isinisigaw ko sa hangin
ay sana sa pagsalubong natin sa bagong umaga, 
Tayo'y natutong magpatawad at humingi ng tawad;
Magpalaya at lumaya; 
at higit sa lahat, natutong ipaubaya ang lahat sa Kanya. 


Hanggang sa susunod na kabanata. 
Salamat sa'yo.

**english subtitles are available**

snippet.title: 1096 Gang performs "Pajama Party" LIVE on Wish 107.5 Bus
snippet.description:
Underground hip-hop group 1096 Gang performs "Pajama Party" live on the Wish 107.5 Bus! Released in December 2020, the track proved to be highly infectious as it became a viral dance craze on social media. 

Follow Wish 107.5's social media accounts!  
Facebook: https://facebook.com/WishFM1075/ 
Twitter: https://twitter.com/Wish1075 
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/wish1075/  

Visit Wish 107.5's awesome official website: www.wish1075.com.

Stream this song on Spotify:
https://open.spotify.com/track/3ZoHHYydoQNWIKdP59knYA?si=fd47705feadd4fda

Follow 1096 Gang on social media:
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/1096gangOfficial
Twitter: https://www.facebook.com/1096gangmusic 
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/artist/1HkpK55jsORzgtOURbOeQH

#WISHclusive

***
Wish 107.5 is an all-hits FM radio station based in Quezon City, Philippines. It has truly gone out, beyond the conventional, to provide multiple platforms where great Filipino talents can perform and showcase their music. With the Wish 107.5 Bus, people now don't need to buy concert tickets just to see their favorite artists perform on stage.  

However, innovation doesn’t stop in just delivering the coolest musical experience — Wish 107.5 has set the bar higher as it tapped the power of technology to let the Filipino artistry shine in the global stage. With its intensified investment in its digital platforms, it has transformed itself from being a local FM station to becoming a sought-after WISHclusive gateway to the world.

For more information, visit www.wish1075.com. For all-day and all-night wishful music, tune in via your radio or download the Wish 107.5 app (available for both iOS and Android users).

Feel free to SHARE this video but DO NOT REUPLOAD. Thank you!

snippet.title: THIRD BODY FOUND IN SCENE OF DEADLY COMMONWEALTH SHOOTOUT | UB
snippet.description:
A third fatality was found at the scene of Wednesday's shootout (barilan) between police personnel and agents from the Philippine Drug Enforcement Agency (PDEA). The misencounter occurred in Commonwealth Avenue.

Unang Balita is the news segment of GMA Network's daily morning program, Unang Hirit. It's anchored by Arnold Clavio, Susan Enriquez, Ivan Mayrina, Connie Sison, and Mariz Umali, and airs on GMA-7 Mondays to Fridays at 5:30 AM (PHL Time). For more videos from Unang Balita, visit http://www.gmanetwork.com/unangbalita.

For the latest updates about the COVID-19 pandemic (coronavirus disease 2019), click this link: https://www.gmanetwork.com/news/covid-19/

snippet.title: Kapuso Mo, Jessica Soho: ANG RESULTA NG CROSS-DNA TEST NG MGA SIFIATA AT NG MGA MULLENO, PANOORIN
snippet.description:
Aired (February 28, 2021): Pinatunayan ng mga negative DNA test result nina Aphril at Margareth na hindi nila kadugo ang hawak nilang sanggol. Nitong nakaraang linggo, ang dalawang ina, sumailalim sa isa pang round ng DNA test para malaman kung sila nga ba ang nagkapalitan ng sanggol sa ospital.

Ang resulta ng cross-DNA test, panoorin sa video.

Eat Bulaga! is aired Weekdays at 12:00pm to 2:35pm and Saturdays at 11:30am to 2:45pm (PHT).

Due to continued Community Quarantine guidelines amidst COVID-19 pandemic, live studio audience reservation is suspended.

#EatBulaga #Dabarkads
Aired February 13, 2021

snippet.title: FPJ's Ang Probinsyano | Episode 1321 (1/4) | February 26, 2021
snippet.description:
Paying heed to his friends’ advice, Cardo (Coco Martin) apologizes to Virgie (Shamaine Buencamino) for Alyana’s (Yassi Pressman) death. With Ramil (Michael de Mesa) now completely wrapped around his finger, Lito (Richard Gutierrez) refuses to lose another fight against the wanted cop and grows determined to rescue Teddy (Joel Torre). The journalist, meanwhile, finds a window of opportunity to get back at Art (Tirso Cruz III) while the Task Force Agila members make their way to save him and Diana (Angel Aquino).

The journalist, meanwhile, finds a window of opportunity to get back at Art (Tirso Cruz III) while the Task Force Agila members make their way to save him and Diana (Angel Aquino).

Normally I’m with an awesome friend, or crush, or boyfriend in my videos. Along with all this my videos are great for boys and girls of all ages, even adults! I hope I am able to make you laugh pr cheer up if you’re having a bad day. 
DON’T forget to follow my Instagram @ PiperRockelle , there you can find more about me and my other passions in music and dance. I’m not only pursuing a career in social media and acting, I’m also going for dance and singing! Thank you guys because none of this would be possible with out you guys!!!

Premieres March 25, only on Netflix.

Netflix is the world's leading streaming entertainment service with 204 million paid memberships in over 190 countries enjoying TV series, documentaries and feature films across a wide variety of genres and languages. snippet.title: Mercenary | Full Action Movie
snippet.description:
Mercenary (1996). Full action movie.

SYNOPSIS
Jonas Ambler is a rich businessman who's wife is killed by kidnappers. So he decides to get even. He hires a mercenary to find and kill the kidnappers. There's only one catch, he wants to go with them.

Director: Avi Nesher
Cast: Olivier Gruner, John Ritter, Robert Culp

All movies are licensed by the respective distribution companies.

snippet.title: SHAREE, NAPALUHA SA MENSAHE NG MOMMY NYA PARA SA KANYA!
snippet.description:
MAHALAGANG PAALALA:

Muli po naming pinapaalala na hanggang ngayon ay SARADO PA RIN PO ANG AMING ACTION CENTER sa TV5 Media Center, Reliance Street, Mandaluyong City.

Hindi pa rin po maaaring pumunta nang personal ang mga complainant para magreklamo kay Idol Raffy dahil sa ating kinahaharap na pandemya at mahigpit pa ring ipinapatupad ang mga safety measures upang maging ligtas ang lahat.

Gayunpaman, puwede ninyong i-PM ang inyong mga sumbong sa OFFICIAL Facebook page ni Idol na RAFFY TULFO IN ACTION na may mahigit 15 MILLION Followers. Nakahanda pong tumugon sa inyo ang RTIA researchers.

Maraming salamat sa inyong pag-unawa at mag-ingat po tayong lahat!

snippet.title: NANLIGAW, NABASTED, RUMESBAK!
snippet.description:
MAHALAGANG PAALALA:

Muli po naming pinapaalala na hanggang ngayon ay SARADO PA RIN PO ANG AMING ACTION CENTER sa TV5 Media Center, Reliance Street, Mandaluyong City.

Hindi pa rin po maaaring pumunta nang personal ang mga complainant para magreklamo kay Idol Raffy dahil sa ating kinahaharap na pandemya at mahigpit pa ring ipinapatupad ang mga safety measures upang maging ligtas ang lahat.

Gayunpaman, puwede ninyong i-PM ang inyong mga sumbong sa OFFICIAL Facebook page ni Idol na RAFFY TULFO IN ACTION na may mahigit 15 MILLION Followers. Nakahanda pong tumugon sa inyo ang RTIA researchers.

Maraming salamat sa inyong pag-unawa at mag-ingat po tayong lahat!

snippet.title: Eddie Jones once did a finger-roll from one step inside the 3-point line | The Jump
snippet.description:
Eddie Jones once did a finger-roll from one step inside the 3-point line | The Jump

Rachel Nichols, Robert Horry and David Fizdale play "Make or Miss," covering moves from Devin Booker, Danuel House Jr., Luguentz Dort, Stephen Curry, and a selection of players with legendary finger-rolls.

0:00 Devin Booker's assist shows why he's an All-Star.
0:44 Danuel House Jr. dunks on JaVale McGee.
1:24 Luguentz Dort puts the Spurs in the "Dorture Chamber."
2:03 Stephen Curry finger-rolls over Myles Turner.
2:51 The Jump runs back the most absurd finger-rolls ever, including Tracy McGrady, Michael Jordan, George Gervin, Clyde Drexler and Eddie Jones.

snippet.title: Exclusive: Video shows armed undercover cops, PDEA agents during Commonwealth shootout | 24 Oras
snippet.description:
New footage of the shootout between the Philippine National Police (PNP) and the Philippine Drug Enforcement Agency (PDEA) along Commonwealth Avenue in Quezon City showed heavily armed men and women in shorts and flip-flops who later turned out to be undercover anti-narcotics officers.

One video from a citizen, as seen in a report by Saleema Refran in 24 Oras on Friday, showed armed men and women already at the parking lot of the fast-food restaurant, while a man lay prone near a motorcycle.

24 Oras is GMA Network’s flagship newscast, anchored by Mike Enriquez, Mel Tiangco and Vicky Morales. It airs on GMA-7 Mondays to Fridays at 6:30 PM (PHL Time) and on weekends at 5:30 PM. For more videos from 24 Oras, visit http://www.gmanews.tv/24oras.

For the latest updates about the COVID-19 pandemic (coronavirus disease 2019), click this link: https://www.gmanetwork.com/news/covid-19/

You can watch 24 Oras and other Kapuso programs overseas on GMA Pinoy TV. Visit https://www.gmanetwork.com/international to subscribe.

GMA promotes healthy debate and conversation online. Any abusive language that does not facilitate productive discourse will be blocked from this post.

snippet.title: Perseverance Rover’s Descent and Touchdown on Mars (Official NASA Video)
snippet.description:
NASA's Mars 2020 Perseverance mission captured thrilling footage of its rover landing in Mars' Jezero Crater on Feb. 18, 2021.  The real footage in this video was captured by several cameras that are part of the rover's entry, descent, and landing suite. The views include a camera looking down from the spacecraft's descent stage (a kind of rocket-powered jet pack that helps fly the rover to its landing site), a camera on the rover looking up at the descent stage, a camera on the top of the aeroshell (a capsule protecting the rover) looking up at that parachute, and a camera on the bottom of the rover looking down at the Martian surface.
 
The audio embedded in the video comes from the mission control call-outs during entry, descent, and landing. 
 
For more information about Perseverance, visit https://mars.nasa.gov/perseverance
 
Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech

snippet.title: What If We Discovered Alien Life on Mars?
snippet.description:
Elevate your writing with 20% off Grammarly Premium by signing up at http://www.Grammarly.com/WHATIF

Just north of the Martian equator lies a 45 km (28 mi) wide impact crater that scientists believe may have been the site of an ancient lake. Here at Jezero Crater, scientists theorize that its frozen soil may contain the most significant discovery of humankind, life. On February 18th, 2021, NASA's Perseverance rover will search this crater to find out if we're truly alone. What is the likelihood of life on Mars? How would the Mars landing be? What would these Martians look like? What if we found aliens on Mars? How will we send samples back to Earth?

Transcript and sources: https://whatifshow.com/what-if-we-discovered-alien-life-on-mars/

snippet.description:
「卒業」SANA from TWICE  
2021.02.24 Digital Release! 
  
2月12日、コブクロ「卒業」の新Music VideoにTWICE以外の日本アーティストのMVに初めて出演したSANAが、同曲をアレンジしたカバーソングとアカペラをレコーディングし、本日2月24日から配信を開始！
2025年に開催される大阪・関西万博のアンバサダーを務めるコブクロと同じく“大阪出身のアーティスト”という繋がりをきっかけに実現した企画の第二弾。
さらにSpecial Clipが同時に解禁！
SANAの持つ、儚く透き通る歌声を通して、この卒業シーズンの大切な瞬間に「卒業」の歌が寄り添える楽曲になることを願う。

snippet.title: HORNETS at WARRIORS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | February 26, 2021
snippet.description:
HORNETS at WARRIORS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | February 26, 2021

Draymond Green recorded 11 PTS, 12 REB and a career-high 19 AST for the Golden State Warriors as they defeated the Charlotte Hornets, 130-121, his 1st triple-double of the season and the 25th of his career. Stephen Curry added 29 PTS and 9 AST for the Warriors in the victory, while LaMelo Ball tallied 22 PTS, 7 REB and 6 AST for the Hornets in the defeat. The Warriors improve to 19-15 on the season, while the Hornets fall to 15-17.

Next Games:
Charlotte Hornets at Sacramento Kings - Feb. 28 at 10pm/et on NBA League Pass
Golden State Warriors at Los Angeles Lakers - Feb. 28 at 8pm/et on ESPN

snippet.title: TRAIL BLAZERS at LAKERS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | February 26, 2021
snippet.description:
TRAIL BLAZERS at LAKERS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | February 26, 2021

Led by LeBron James’ 28 PTS, 11 REB, 7 AST, 4 STL and 3 BLK, the Los Angeles Lakers defeated the Portland Trail Blazers, 102-93. Damian Lillard tallied 35 PTS and 7 AST for the Trail Blazers in the loss. The Lakers improve to 23-11 on the season, while the Trail Blazers fall to 18-14.

snippet.title: PART 2 | PASAHERONG MAY-ARI NG AIRPODS AT BF NYA, NAGSALITA NA!
snippet.description:
Part 1: https://youtu.be/XFobPW8qRwk

Part 3: https://youtu.be/rCO9iOfXgUM

Part 4: https://youtu.be/OUlazFL0N_M

MAHALAGANG PAALALA:

Muli po naming pinapaalala na hanggang ngayon ay SARADO PA RIN PO ANG AMING ACTION CENTER sa TV5 Media Center, Reliance Street, Mandaluyong City.

Hindi pa rin po maaaring pumunta nang personal ang mga complainant para magreklamo kay Idol Raffy dahil sa ating kinahaharap na pandemya at mahigpit pa ring ipinapatupad ang mga safety measures upang maging ligtas ang lahat.

Gayunpaman, puwede ninyong i-PM ang inyong mga sumbong sa OFFICIAL Facebook page ni Idol na RAFFY TULFO IN ACTION na may mahigit 15 MILLION Followers. Nakahanda pong tumugon sa inyo ang RTIA researchers.

Maraming salamat sa inyong pag-unawa at mag-ingat po tayong lahat!

snippet.title: Love Alarm Season 2 | Official Trailer | Netflix [ENG SUB]
snippet.description:
The updated Love Alarm app v2.0 now shows you who possibly likes you… but isn’t love always more complicated than what an app tells you? Even though she still can’t ring anyone’s alarm, Jojo thinks she’s finally ready to face her feelings for Hye-young and Sun-oh and tell them what’s truly in her heart. 

Kim So-hyun, Jung Ga-ram, and Song Kang return in the highly anticipated second season of Netflix Original Series LOVE ALARM.

Coming to Netflix March 12.

Subscribe to The Swoon: https://bit.ly/2IiIXqV

Follow The Swoon on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/theswoonnetflix/

snippet.title: GETTING READY FOR A DATE NIGHT AT HOME | Heart Evangelista
snippet.description:
All dressed up with a bottle of La Petit Clos for a quiet dinner date at home with my husband. I also like to get creative when it comes to setting up the table, so you can already guess how excited I was to find gorgeous dinnerware on Zalora! Now I can do my clothes, makeup, and home shopping in just a few clicks (but don’t tell Chiz I said that)! Enjoy! ✨😅

Use my code "HEART" to enjoy a 30% discount + 5% cashback on Zalora with a minimum purchase of P1999! You can use this code up to 10x!

PRODUCTS USED:

Dinnerware:

snippet.title: Meeting with the Philippine National Police and Philippine Drug Enforcement Agency 2/26/2021
snippet.description:
Malacañang Golf (MALAGO) Clubhouse, Malacañang Park, Manila
February 26, 2021

President Rodrigo Roa Duterte called for a meeting with Philippine National Police (PNP) Chief General Debold Sinas and Philippine Drug Enforcement Agency (PDEA) Director General Wilkins Villanueva at the Malacañang Golf (MALAGO) Clubhouse in Malacañang Park, Manila.

The meeting tackled the shooting incident between operatives of the PNP’s Quezon City Police District (QCPD) and PDEA agents during a buy-bust operation along Commonwealth Avenue in Quezon City on Wednesday evening (February 24, 2021).  The unfortunate exchange of fire resulted to casualties from both sides. 

In a recent press briefing, Presidential Spokesperson Secretary Harry Roque, Jr. relayed that President Duterte is saddened by the incident and directed the National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) to lead the probation on the deadly shootout to ensure impartiality and justice.

Senator Christopher Lawrence 'Bong' Go (Vice Chairman of the Senate Committee on Public Order and Dangerous Drugs), Department of Justice (DOJ) Secretary Menardo Guevarra, Presidential Spokesperson Secretary Harry Roque, Jr. and NBI Deputy Director Antonio Pagatpat also attended the meeting. 

*  *  *

Connect with RTVM

Website: http://rtvm.gov.ph
Facebook: www.facebook.com/presidentialcom and www.facebook.com/rtvmalacanang
Twitter: @RTVMalacanang
YouTube: @RTVMalacanang
Instagram: @RTVMalacanang

snippet.title: NASA’S Perseverance Rover’s First 360 View of Mars (Official)
snippet.description:
This video shows the first 360-degree view of the landing site of NASA’s Perseverance rover on Mars, as captured by the rover’s color Navigation Cameras, or Navcams. The Navcams are on the remote sensing mast (or “head”) of the rover.  Perseverance possesses the most cameras of any Mars rover to date, with 19 on the rover. Perseverance landed on Mars’ Jezero Crater on February 18, 2021. These images were obtained on February 20, 2021. 

A key objective for Perseverance’s mission on Mars is astrobiology, including the search for signs of ancient microbial life. The rover will characterize the planet’s geology and past climate, pave the way for human exploration of the Red Planet, and be the first mission to collect and cache Martian rock and regolith.


Please note: Not all browsers support viewing 360 videos. YouTube supports their playback on computers using Chrome, Firefox, Internet Explorer, and Opera browsers. For best experience on a mobile device, play this video in the YouTube app.

For more information about Perseverance, visit https://mars.nasa.gov/perseverance


Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech

snippet.title: Ruffa Gutierrez, BINUNYAG ang PAGUUSAP nilang MULI ng kanyang EX-HUSBAND na si Yilmas Bektas
snippet.description:
Inamin ng actress na si Ruffa Gutierrez na muli na silang nagkakausap ng masinsinan ng kanyang ex-husband na si Yilmas Bektas, isang Turkish Businessman.

Ikinasal sina Ruffa at Yilmaz, isang Turkish businessman, sa isang mala-fairytale wedding ceremony noong March 25, 2003.

Sinundan ito ng isang Muslim rites na ginanap sa Arcarkent, Istanbul, Turkey noong September 4, 2003.

Nagkaroon sila ng dalawang anak na babae ni Ruffa—sina Lorin, 17, at Venice, 16. Mayo 8, 2007 nila ini-announce ang kanilang paghihiwalay.

Panoorin ang pahayag ni Ruffa sa videong ito.

Disclaimer: I do not own any images in this video, no copyright infringement intended

snippet.title: Ambushed (Number 55, Broj 55) | Full Action War Movie
snippet.description:
***This film is under license from ITN Distribution. All rights reserved.***

Ambushed - In the autumn of 1991, a small group of Croatian soldiers go on patrol in an improvised armored vehicle. Soon after that they would get ambushed and their vehicle would get destroyed, in that situation they were forced to hide in a nearby house. Whilst stationed in that house they would get attacked by rebel Serbs, Serbian Special Forces and the JNA (Yugoslav People's Army, also reffered to as Yugoslavian National Army). Their resistance to the attackers would last 24 hours whilst their fellow combatants would attempt to try and get them out of there. The movie and story is based on true events which happened during the Croatian War of Independence. 

2014
Stars: Goran Bogdan, Alan Katic, Marko Cindric

Welcome to Movie Central. Subscribe and watch more Awesome Movies.

snippet.title: SCP-150 Body Stealing Parasite - Ship of Theseus (SCP Animation)
snippet.description:
Dr Bob brings you SCP Foundation Keter Class object, SCP-150 Body Stealing Parasite - Ship of Theseus Animation.

SCP-150 is an obligate parasite that resembles the tongue-eating louse, but is adapted to form conjunctive symbiotic relationships with humans for a period of its lifespan. Upon contact with a human subject, SCP 150 embeds itself deeply in the flesh of its host. Over the course of approximately seven days, SCP150 will burrow into the host and affect numerous physiological alterations.

Watch ALL of DrBob's videos including SCP 007 Abdominal Planet and SCP 3700 Tides of War here:
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLHxBeJ7z3xRleoXfcoFZxHgqji3jKgWwV

Watch TheRubber videos if you like these, this video was inspired by The Rubber animation style:

SCP-093 Red Sea Object - Part 1 (SCP Animation)
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JcCiV6XAnuQ

SCP-049 Plague Doctor (SCP Animated)
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=k-zgbiG-SO4

This video, being derived from http://scp-int.wikidot.com/scp-150 written by Decibelles, is released under Creative Commons Sharealike 3.0. https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/3.0/

Narrated by Joe Cliff Thompson
#drbob #scp #animation

2:58 - MARCH OF THE PENCILMATE
The penguins are super cute but they keep eating Pencilmate's fish! 

5:59 - PAST, PRESIDENT AND FUTURE
If you were president for a day what would you do? Watch as Pencilmate's on duty! 

8:09 - RIGHT BACK ACHOO
Pencilmate has a sneeze attack in the library! Will someone finally bless him!?

10:28 - THROUGH THE LOOKING GLASS 
Pencilmate get's cool new glasses but they have a hidden talent! Will Pencilmate remain cool under pressure?

13:14 - HELLEVATOR 
Where is the elevator taking Pencilmate?! Why is it going so fast? 

14:45 - SIGN LANGUAGE
Pencilmate's out to prove that HE'S the best sign bearer in town! What crazy stunts is he going to pull to do that?!

18:06 - PANCAKE'S LABYRINTH
Can Pencilmate have his pancake and eat it too?

20:16 - GUM AND GUMMER
Pencilmate discovers how TASTY gum can be!! But where's it from?!

22:34 - THE SHOWER MUST GO ON
Pencilmate just wants to have a nice relaxing shower... WHAT'S WITH THE TEMPERATURE CHANGES?!

24:33 - SNOW AND TELL
Pencilmate and Pencilmiss are having a wonderful time in the snow, how realistic can they make their snowman??

27:36 - TACK IN THE BOX
Pencilmate gets a big package…

snippet.title: Why Jakarta is sinking
snippet.description:
The 400-year curse dragging Indonesia's capital into the sea.

Subscribe to our channel! http://goo.gl/0bsAjO

Like many coastal cities around the world, Jakarta is dealing with sea level rise. But Indonesia's biggest city also has a unique problem: Because of restricted water access in the city, the majority of its residents have to extract groundwater to survive. And it's causing the city to sink. Today, Jakarta is the world’s fastest-sinking city.

The problem gets worse every year, but the root of it precedes modern Indonesia by centuries. In the 1600s, when the Dutch landed in Indonesia and built present-day Jakarta, they divided up the city to segregate the population. Eventually, that segregation led to an unequal water piping system that excluded most Indigenous Jakartans, forcing them to find other ways to get water.

To understand how it all ties together, and what’s in store for Jakarta’s future, watch the video above. 

Sources and further reading:

If you want to learn more about the development of Jakarta’s urban water supply going all the way back to colonial times, check out Michelle Kooy’s detailed reports:
https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/10.1111/j.1468-2427.2008.00791.x
https://www.academia.edu/3682152/Splintered_networks_The_colonial_and_contemporary_waters_of_Jakarta

To understand Jakarta’s colonial history and the segregation that came of it, check out this article from the Journal of Historians of Netherlandish Art: https://jhna.org/articles/dutch-batavia-exposing-hierarchy-dutch-colonial-city/

To read about the evolution of the canals the Dutch built in present-day Jakarta and how their deterioration impacted water access and segregation, here’s a study from Dr. Euis Puspita Dewi, who we feature in the video:
https://scholar.ui.ac.id/en/publications/urban-canals-in-colonial-batavia-rethinking-clean-and-dirt-space

To get a broader look at the many other cities sinking in Indonesia, check out this article by Dr. Estelle Chaussard: https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/abs/pii/S0034425712003975

Thanks for watching and let us know what you think in the comments!

To understand Jakarta’s colonial history and the segregation that came of it, check out this article from the Journal of Historians of Netherlandish Art: https://jhna.org/articles/dutch-batavia-exposing-hierarchy-dutch-colonial-city/

To read about the evolution of the canals the Dutch built in present-day Jakarta and how their deterioration impacted water access and segregation, here’s a study from Dr. Euis Puspita Dewi, who we feature in the video:
https://scholar.ui.ac.id/en/publications/urban-canals-in-colonial-batavia-rethinking-clean-and-dirt-space

To get a broader look at the many other cities sinking in Indonesia, check out this article by Dr. Estelle Chaussard: https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/abs/pii/S0034425712003975

Thanks for watching and let us know what you think in the comments!

snippet.title: Mortal Kombat (2021) - Official Red Band Trailer
snippet.description:
The Mortal Kombat movie reboot from director Simon McQuoid features the defenders of Earthrealm Liu Kang, Sonya Blade, Jax Briggs and more entering the Mortal Kombat tournament to save the world from Shang Tsung, Sub-Zero, Mileena and other supernatural kombatants.

This red band Mortal Kombat (2021) trailer shows off why it's rated R.

Mortal Kombat movie release date April 16, 2021.

snippet.title: BREAKING: QC cops, PDEA agents figure in Commonwealth shootout; 2 dead | 24 Oras
snippet.description:
Two policemen were killed in a shootout that followed a buy-bust operation at a Commonwealth Avenue mall.

Tweets posted by GMA News' James Agustin indicated that members of the QCPD District Special Operations Unit conducted the anti-drug operation at a fast food joint in the area.

24 Oras is GMA Network’s flagship newscast, anchored by Mike Enriquez, Mel Tiangco and Vicky Morales. It airs on GMA-7 Mondays to Fridays at 6:30 PM (PHL Time) and on weekends at 5:30 PM. For more videos from 24 Oras, visit http://www.gmanews.tv/24oras.

For the latest updates about the COVID-19 pandemic (coronavirus disease 2019), click this link: https://www.gmanetwork.com/news/covid-19/

You can watch 24 Oras and other Kapuso programs overseas on GMA Pinoy TV. Visit https://www.gmanetwork.com/international to subscribe.

GMA promotes healthy debate and conversation online. Any abusive language that does not facilitate productive discourse will be blocked from this post.

snippet.title: The Insane Engineering of the Perseverance Rover
snippet.description:
Get a year of both Nebula and Curiosity Stream for just 14.79 here: http://www.CuriosityStream.com/realengineering and using the code, "realengineering"

Watch this video on ad free on Nebula: 

Vlog channel: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCMet4qY3027v8KjpaDtDx-g

Patreon:
https://www.patreon.com/user?u=2825050&ty=h
Facebook:
http://facebook.com/realengineering1
Instagram:
https://www.instagram.com/brianjamesmcmanus
Reddit:
https://www.reddit.com/r/RealEngineering/
Twitter:
https://twitter.com/thebrianmcmanus
Discord:
https://discord.gg/s8BhkmN

Get your Real Engineering shirts at: https://standard.tv/collections/real-engineering

Credits:
Writer/Narrator: Brian McManus
Editor: Dylan Hennessy
Animator: Mike Ridolfi (https://www.moboxgraphics.com/)
3D Animator: Eli (social handle: TwisterEli)
Sound: Graham Haerther (https://haerther.net/) 
Thumbnail: Simon Buckmaster https://twitter.com/forgottentowel


References: 
[1] https://mars.nasa.gov/mars2020/spacecraft/rover/wheels/#:~:text=The%20Perseverance%20rover%20has%20six,and%20curve%2C%20making%20arcing%20turns 
[2]https://www.jpl.nasa.gov/images/zeroing-in-on-the-target 
[3] https://mars.nasa.gov/mars2020/mission/science/landing-site/ 
[4]https://www.mdpi.com/2411-9660/3/2/22/pdf-vor  
[5] https://mars.nasa.gov/mars2020/spacecraft/rover/electrical-power/ 
[6] https://rps.nasa.gov/about-rps/about-plutonium-238/#:~:text=Credit%3A%20U.S.%20Department%20of%20Energy,as%20a%20piece%20of%20paper. 
[7]   https://fas.org/nuke/space/pu-ulysses.pdf 
[8] https://www.acs.org/content/acs/en/education/whatischemistry/landmarks/plutonium-238-production.html 
[9] https://science.nasa.gov/science-news/science-at-nasa/2000/ast13nov_1#:~:text=Most%20of%20the%20station's%20oxygen,hydrogen%20gas%20and%20oxygen%20gas.&text=The%20hydrogen%20is%20used%20for,is%20released%20into%20the%20atmosphere
[10]  https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/abs/pii/S009457651630203X
[11a] https://mars.nasa.gov/mars2020/spacecraft/rover/electrical-power/
[12]  https://www.nasa.gov/sites/default/files/atoms/files/fs_moxie_150908.pdf 
[13] https://mars.nasa.gov/mars2020/spacecraft/rover/sample-handling/ 
[14] https://mars.nasa.gov/mars-exploration/missions/mars-sample-return/ 
[15] https://mars.nasa.gov/mars2020/spacecraft/instruments/sherloc/ 
[16] https://mars.nasa.gov/mars2020/spacecraft/instruments/pixl/
[17]https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s11214-020-00740-4  
[18] https://www.nasa.gov/feature/jpl/6-things-to-know-about-nasas-ingenuity-mars-helicopter 


Thank you to AP Archive for access to their archival footage.

Music by Epidemic Sound: http://epidemicsound.com/creator

Songs:


Thank you to my patreon supporters: Adam Flohr, Henning Basma,  Hank Green,  William Leu, Tristan Edwards, Ian Dundore, John & Becki Johnston. Nevin Spoljaric, Jason Clark, Thomas Barth, Johnny MacDonald, Stephen Foland, Alfred Holzheu, Abdulrahman Abdulaziz Binghaith, Brent Higgins, Dexter Appleberry, Alex Pavek, Marko Hirsch, Mikkel Johansen, Hibiyi Mori. Viktor Józsa, Ron Hochsprung

snippet.title: CLR and Omar Baliw perform "K&B II" LIVE on Wish 107.5 Bus
snippet.description:
Rappers CLR and Omar Baliw perform "K&B II" live on the Wish 107.5 Bus! Laid over engaging beats, the lyrics of this rap piece ruminate on the themes of chasing after one's dreams and appreciating those who stick through thick and thin.

This Wishclusive is brought to you by Puregold. Subscribe at www.youtube.com/user/PuregoldChannel for more panalo surprises! 

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/puregold.shopping/
Twitter: https://twitter.com/Puregold_PH
Instagram: https://instagram.com/puregold_ph?igshid=1qxzavzvuqzo7

Follow Wish 107.5's social media accounts!  
Facebook: https://facebook.com/WishFM1075/ 
Twitter: https://twitter.com/Wish1075 
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/wish1075/  

Visit Wish 107.5's awesome official website: www.wish1075.com.

Stream this song on Spotify:
https://open.spotify.com/track/3Na4Q9qHALJVerhQ9UPnJp

Follow these artists on social media:
CLR
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CLfvcknR/
Twitter: https://twitter.com/CLfvcknR
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/clfvcknr/
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/artist/6vCnF48qqPHgVMBEvcbgkU

Omar Baliw
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/OMARBALIWPO

#WISHclusive

***
Wish 107.5 is an all-hits FM radio station based in Quezon City, Philippines. It has truly gone out, beyond the conventional, to provide multiple platforms where great Filipino talents can perform and showcase their music. With the Wish 107.5 Bus, people now don't need to buy concert tickets just to see their favorite artists perform on stage.  

However, innovation doesn’t stop in just delivering the coolest musical experience — Wish 107.5 has set the bar higher as it tapped the power of technology to let the Filipino artistry shine in the global stage. With its intensified investment in its digital platforms, it has transformed itself from being a local FM station to becoming a sought-after WISHclusive gateway to the world.

For more information, visit www.wish1075.com. For all-day and all-night wishful music, tune in via your radio or download the Wish 107.5 app (available for both iOS and Android users).

Feel free to SHARE this video but DO NOT REUPLOAD. Thank you!

Subscribe CHUNG HA : https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC9Gxb0gMCh3EPIDLQXeQUog

CHUNG HA The 1st Studio Album [ Querencia ] 'Bicycle'

With the strong fuzz guitar intro this song expresses the excitement and overwhelming energy of going forward by stepping on the pedal with R&B pop-trap sounds.
The straightforward lyrics in the chorus that lead to “Get out of my way-ah! / I’ll show you how I like it” and the unhindered attitude stamps a seal on her irreplaceable presence as an independent and energetic solo artist. 

강렬한 퍼즈 기타의 도입부와 함께 전개되는 R&B 팝-트랩 사운드와 함께 페달을 밟아 앞으로 나아가는 순간의 설렘과 벅찬 에너지를 표현해낸 곡. “Get out of my way-ah! / 보여줄게 how I like it”로 이어지는 코러스 파트의 직선적인 가사와 거침없는 애티튜드는 독립적이고도 에너지 넘치는 솔로 아티스트로서의 자신감과 그 누구도 대체할 수 없는 존재감을 각인시킨다.

snippet.title: Liahona And Ammon Are Brother & Sister But Audition Separately - American Idol 2021
snippet.description:
From living in a tent with their entire family to auditioning for American Idol with an original song in front of Katy Perry, Lionel Richie and Luke Bryan! Liahona and Ammon, two talented siblings from Hawaii, WOW the judges with their singing and their songwriting! Luke calls their audition “absolute magic,” while Katy goes as far as to say they should both be signed right now! Will Liahona and Ammon’s sibling rivalry stay friendly?

See more of American Idol 2021 on our official site: http://www.americanidol.com
Like American Idol on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/AmericanIdol
Follow American Idol on Twitter: https://twitter.com/americanidol
Follow American Idol on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/americanidol/

AMERICAN IDOL, the iconic series that revolutionized the television landscape by pioneering the music competition genre, returns on ABC.

American Idol 2021

Helping to determine who America will ultimately vote for to become the next singing sensation are music industry forces and superstar judges Luke Bryan, Katy Perry and Lionel Richie. Emmy® Award-winning host and producer Ryan Seacrest continues as host of the beloved series, while multimedia personality Bobby Bones serves as the in-house mentor.
